rationale: Bake-off 2026-05-13 (kstrat2001/darkmux#45 closure). D (qwen3.6-35b-a3b-turboquant-mlx) hired for routine coding — won 4/4 paired rounds. B (qwen3-coder-next-mlx) reserved for single-shot prose quality (voice-editor was the Pair 2 Taste 5/5 standout). A (qwen3.5-122b-a10b) reserved as heavy-reasoning defensive — not pinned to any role; operators escalate manually. mission-compiler pinned to the 4B admin per CLAUDE.md Beat 21 (admin-agent role family — bounded structuring work, throughput matters). Non-SWE roles default to D until per-role bake-offs land for them.
